explanations.8: The `any()` function returns true if at least one of those database-related keywords is found anywhere in the service name.
explanations.18: yaml.safe_load() reads the YAML file and converts it into a Python dictionary we can work with.
explanations.23: data.get('services', {}) safely retrieves the services section from the YAML, returning an empty dictionary if it doesn't exist.
explanations.28: config['depends_on'] is a list of service names that this service depends on, so we loop through each one.
explanations.32: .keys() gives us just the network names (not their full configuration objects).
explanations.64: cmd.extend() adds more arguments to the command list only if the style file actually exists on disk.
